message:
refresh COMPAT-CLOSURE-I attestation pack after FP-P2C-001 parity reports were regenerated

Re-runs the Phase 2C COMPAT-CLOSURE-I evidence pipeline and freezes
the new artifact hashes:

`artifacts/phase2c/compat_closure_attestation_summary.json`:
  - generated_unix_ms       1777158167003 -> 1777213948522
  - attestation_signature   sha256:8a43b6c8...3b9170 ->
                            sha256:4f1182b6...8ad1ca

`artifacts/phase2c/compat_closure_final_evidence_pack.json`:
  - generated_unix_ms       updated to match summary
  - file_hashes block: three FP-P2C-001 parity reports re-hashed
    (the underlying `.json` content has changed; only the artifact
    digests change here, not the schema):
      - parity_report.decode_proof.json
        sha256:520f01c3...20227 -> sha256:a9c47033...0fe2ca8
      - parity_report.json
        sha256:b1787b46...01ef2c1 -> sha256:82665f7e...745b4
      - parity_report.raptorq.json
        sha256:c85798cf...784d601 -> sha256:4fc3f115...c9137e
  - attestation_signature kept consistent with the summary file

Unchanged in this commit:
  - all_checks_passed: still true
  - coverage_percent: still 100
  - strict_zero_drift: still true
  - hardened_allowlisted_total: still 2
  - packet_count: still 1
  - the rest of the file_hashes block (parity_gate_result.json,
    parity_mismatch_corpus.json, COMPAT_CLOSURE_TEST_LOGGING_EVIDENCE.md,
    PERFORMANCE_BASELINES.md)

This keeps the attestation summary and the evidence pack in sync so
the migration manifest's claim_id `COMPAT-CLOSURE-I/attestation`
verifies cleanly against the current FP-P2C-001 parity outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 {
   "claim_id": "COMPAT-CLOSURE-I/attestation",
-  "generated_unix_ms": 1777158167003,
+  "generated_unix_ms": 1777213948522,
   "all_checks_passed": true,
   "coverage_percent": 100,
   "strict_zero_drift": true,
   "hardened_allowlisted_total": 2,
   "packet_count": 1,
-  "attestation_signature": "sha256:8a43b6c819cbabed9563a57fde485e8fff3f7af7eeb8f58bc29df6f4103b9170",
+  "attestation_signature": "sha256:4f1182b6b12d34dfcf83450042f8ca99fda7ed790d60198315f1da19238ad1ca",
   "evidence_pack_path": "artifacts/phase2c/compat_closure_final_evidence_pack.json",
   "migration_manifest_path": "artifacts/phase2c/compat_closure_migration_manifest.json"
 }
\ No newline at end of file
